mapper.select: /* bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondPayList */ SELECT A.BILL_YM AS BILL_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , SUM(A.PYMN_AMNT) AS SUM_PYMN_AMT , MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE) AS BLPYM_DATE , B.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM , C.BOND_SEQ_NUM AS BOND_SEQ_NUM FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A , MSP_BOND_MST B , MSP_BOND_DTL C WHERE 1=1 AND B.BOND_SEQ_NUM = C.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND C.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') AND A.BILL_YM = C.BILL_YM AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND A.BILL_ITEM_CD IN ( 'EQIST', 'EQISV' ) AND A.PYMN_CD = 'PYM' AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND B.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.BILL_YM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, B.CONTRACT_NUM, C.BOND_SEQ_NUM

/* bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondUnpayList */ SELECT A.BILL_YM AS BILL_YM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , SUM(A.PYMN_AMNT) AS SUM_PYMN_AMT , MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE) AS BLPYM_DATE , B.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM , C.BOND_SEQ_NUM AS BOND_SEQ_NUM FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A , MSP_BOND_MST B , MSP_BOND_DTL C WHERE 1=1 AND B.BOND_SEQ_NUM = C.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.BILL_YM = C.BILL_YM AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND A.BILL_ITEM_CD IN ( 'EQIST', 'EQISV' ) AND A.PYMN_CD = 'PYM' AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND C.UNPAY_YN = 'Y' AND B.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.BILL_YM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, B.CONTRACT_NUM, C.BOND_SEQ_NUM

/* bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondUnpayMonthList */ SELECT A.BILL_YM AS BILL_YM FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A , MSP_BOND_MST B , MSP_BOND_DTL C WHERE 1=1 AND B.BOND_SEQ_NUM = C.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.BILL_YM = C.BILL_YM AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND A.BILL_ITEM_CD IN ( 'EQIST', 'EQISV' ) AND A.PYMN_CD = 'PYM' AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND C.UNPAY_YN = 'Y' AND B.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.BILL_YM
mapper.update:
/** bondChkScheduleMapper.updateMspBondDtlUnpayY */ UPDATE MSP_BOND_DTL A SET UNPAY_YN = 'Y'
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_BOND_MST B WHERE A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND B.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' ) AND BILL_YM = #{billYm} AND (BILL_AMT - NVL(PAY_AMT,0)) > 0

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.updateMspBondDtlUnpayN */ UPDATE MSP_BOND_DTL A SET UNPAY_YN = 'N'
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_BOND_MST B WHERE A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND B.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' ) AND BILL_YM = #{billYm} AND (BILL_AMT - NVL(PAY_AMT,0)) <= 0

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.updateMspBondMstUnpayY */ UPDATE MSP_BOND_MST SET UNPAY_YN = 'Y'
WHERE 1 = 1 AND BOND_SEQ_NUM IN (SELECT DISTINCT BOND_SEQ_NUM FROM MSP_BOND_DTL WHERE UNPAY_YN = 'Y')
mapper.select: /** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondMstFullPayList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_BOND_DTL B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.INST_AMT - NVL(A.PAY_AMT,0) <= 0 AND A.INST_YN = 'Y' AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND A.INST_AMT > 0 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticMstTrgt */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT, 0, 6) AS OPEN_YM , NVL(SUM(B.PAY_AMT),0) AS RCV_AMT FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_BOND_DTL B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND B.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' /*AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' 이건 좀 생각해 봐야 함*/ GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT, 0, 6) ORDER BY OPEN_YM

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDtlTrgt */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT, 0, 6) AS OPEN_YM , B.BILL_YM , NVL(SUM(B.PAY_AMT), 0) AS RCV_AMT FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_BOND_DTL B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND B.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' GROUP BY B.BILL_YM, SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT, 0, 6) ORDER BY OPEN_YM

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticErlyTrgt */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , SUM(B.PAY_AMT) AS ERLY_RFND_AMT , COUNT(DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS ERLY_RFND_CNT FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_BOND_DTL B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.INST_AMT - NVL(A.PAY_AMT,0) <= 0 AND A.INST_YN = 'Y' AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.INST_AMT > 0 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND A.INST_MNTH_CNT > (SELECT COUNT(PAY_AMT) FROM MSP_BOND_DTL WHERE BOND_SEQ_NUM = A.BOND_SEQ_NUM) GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6)
mapper.update: /** bondChkScheduleMapper.updateMspBondStaticMstErly */ UPDATE MSP_BOND_STATIC_MST SET ERLY_RFND_CNT = (SELECT SUM(ERLY_RFND_CNT) FROM MSP_BOND_STATIC_DTL WHERE OPEN_YM = #{openYm}) , ERLY_RFND_AMT = (SELECT SUM(ERLY_RFND_AMT) FROM MSP_BOND_STATIC_DTL WHERE OPEN_YM = #{openYm}) WHERE 1 = 1 AND OPEN_YM = #{openYm}
mapper.select: /** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticRmnTrgt */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , COUNT(1) AS RMN_CNTR_CNT FROM MSP_BOND_MST A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.INST_YN = 'Y' AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND A.INST_AMT > 0 AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6)
mapper.update: /** bondChkScheduleMapper.updateBondStaticDtlRmn */ UPDATE MSP_BOND_STATIC_DTL SET RMN_CNTR_CNT = (SELECT INST_OPEN_CNT FROM MSP_BOND_STATIC_MST WHERE OPEN_YM = #{openYm}) - NVL((SELECT SUM(ERLY_RFND_CNT) FROM MSP_BOND_STATIC_DTL WHERE OPEN_YM = #{openYm} AND BILL_YM <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM')),0) WHERE 1 =1 AND OPEN_YM = #{openYm} AND BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM')
mapper.select: /** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondMstTmntTrgtList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE,0,8) AS TMNT_DT , SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_BOND_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND B.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE,0,6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM')

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondMstTmntList */ SELECT COUNT(A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS CAN_CNT , SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_BOND_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND B.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE,0,6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6)
mapper.update: /** bondChkScheduleMapper.updateMspBondStaticMstTmnt */ UPDATE MSP_BOND_STATIC_MST SET CAN_CNT = (SELECT SUM(CAN_CNT) FROM MSP_BOND_STATIC_DTL WHERE OPEN_YM = #{openYm}) WHERE 1 = 1 AND OPEN_YM = #{openYm}
mapper.select: /** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDlyTrgt */ SELECT SUM(PYMN_AMNT) AS DLY_ADD_AMT , SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , A.BILL_YM FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A , MSP_BOND_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BILL_ITEM_CD = 'LTPYM' AND A.PYMN_CD = 'PYM' AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6), A.BILL_YM

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDlyCnt */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , B.BILL_YM , COUNT(B.BOND_SEQ_NUM) AS DLY_CNT FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_BOND_DTL B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.INST_YN = 'Y' AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND B.UNPAY_YN = 'Y' AND B.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6), B.BILL_YM

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticAdjTrgt */ SELECT COUNT(A.SVC_CNTR_NO) AS ADJ_CNT , SUM(PYMN_AMNT) AS ADJ_AMT , SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , A.BILL_YM FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A , MSP_BOND_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.PYMN_CD = 'ADJ' AND A.ADJS_RSN_CD = 'BA1' AND A.BILL_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6), A.BILL_YM

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDtlMnthTrgt */ SELECT A.OPEN_YM , A.BILL_YM , B.BOND_AMT - NVL((SELECT SUM(RCV_AMT)+SUM(DLY_PAY_AMT)+SUM(ERLY_RFND_AMT) FROM MSP_BOND_STATIC_DTL WHERE OPEN_YM = A.OPEN_YM AND A.INST_MNTH_NUM > INST_MNTH_NUM),0) AS MNTH_FST_AMT , (A.RMN_CNTR_CNT + A.ERLY_RFND_CNT) AS MNTH_FST_CNT , B.BOND_AMT - NVL((SELECT SUM(RCV_AMT)+SUM(DLY_PAY_AMT)+SUM(ERLY_RFND_AMT) FROM MSP_BOND_STATIC_DTL WHERE OPEN_YM = A.OPEN_YM AND A.INST_MNTH_NUM >= INST_MNTH_NUM),0) AS MNTH_LST_AMT FROM MSP_BOND_STATIC_DTL A , MSP_BOND_STATIC_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.OPEN_YM = B.OPEN_YM AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM')

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDtlMnthDlyTrgt */ SELECT OPEN_YM , MAX(MON1) AS DLY_MON1 , MAX(MON2) AS DLY_MON2 , MAX(MON3) AS DLY_MON3 , MAX(MON4) AS DLY_MON4 , MAX(MON5) AS DLY_MON5 , MAX(MON6) AS DLY_MON6 , MAX(MON7) AS DLY_MON7 , MAX(MON8) AS DLY_MON8 , MAX(MON9) AS DLY_MON9 , MAX(MON10) AS DLY_MON10 , MAX(MON11) AS DLY_MON11 FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 1, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON1 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 2, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON2 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 3, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON3 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 4, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON4 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 5, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON5 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 6, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON6 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 7, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON7 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 8, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON8 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 9, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON9 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 10, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON10 , DECODE (ROUND(months_between(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))), 11, SUM(A.INST_AMT - A.PAY_AMT)) AS MON11 FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_BOND_DTL B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.INST_YN = 'Y' AND B.UNPAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND B.BILL_YM <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6), B.BILL_YM ) GROUP BY OPEN_YM

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDtlMnthDlyTrgt2 */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OEPN_YM , SUM(B.BILL_AMT - B.PAY_AMT) AS DLY_MON12 FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_BOND_DTL B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.INST_YN = 'Y' AND B.UNPAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND B.BILL_YM <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') AND ROUND(MONTHS_BETWEEN(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2), TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM,'YYYYMM'))) > 11 GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6)

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDtlNotBillAmt */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , SUM(BILL_AMT) AS DLY_NOT_BILL_AMT FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_BOND_DTL B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.INST_YN = 'Y' AND A.UNPAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND B.BILL_YM > TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6)

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDtlNmlAmt */ SELECT SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , A.BILL_YM , SUM(A.PYMN_AMNT) AS NML_BILL_AMT FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A , MSP_BOND_MST B , MSP_BOND_DTL C WHERE 1=1 AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND B.BOND_SEQ_NUM = C.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.BILL_YM = C.BILL_YM AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND B.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND B.INST_YN = 'Y' AND A.PYMN_CD = 'INV' AND A.BILL_ITEM_CD IN ( 'EQIST', 'EQISV' ) AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6), A.BILL_YM

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDtlDlyBillAmt */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , SUM(B.BILL_AMT) - NVL(SUM(B.PAY_AMT),0) AS DLY_BILL_AMT FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_BOND_DTL B WHERE 1=1 AND B.UNPAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6)

/** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspBondStaticDtlDlyPayAmt */ SELECT SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6) AS OPEN_YM /*, A.BILL_YM AS BILL_YM*/ , SUM(A.PYMN_AMNT) AS DLY_PAY_AMT FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A , MSP_BOND_MST B , MSP_BOND_DTL C WHERE 1=1 AND B.BOND_SEQ_NUM = C.BOND_SEQ_NUM AND A.BILL_YM = C.BILL_YM AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND A.BILL_ITEM_CD IN ( 'EQIST', 'EQISV' ) AND A.PYMN_CD = 'PYM' AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND C.UNPAY_YN = 'Y' AND B.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6)
